data.title: KULR Technology Group’s Stellar Q3 2025 Earnings Call
data.description:
KULR Technology Group ((KULR)) has held its Q3 earnings call. Read on for the main highlights of the call.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

KULR Technology Group’s recent earnings call exuded a strong positive sentiment, underscored by record revenue growth and a solid financial position. Despite facing challenges such as a decline in services revenue and one-time impairments, the overall outlook remains optimistic as the company continues to expand and innovate in high-growth markets.

Record Revenue Growth

KULR Technology Group reported approximately $6.9 million in revenue for Q3 2025, marking a remarkable 116% increase year-over-year and a 75% sequential growth from the previous quarter. This impressive growth highlights the company’s successful strategies and robust market demand for its products.

Strong Financial Position

The company maintains a robust financial foundation, boasting approximately $140 million in cash and digital assets and no debt, following the repayment of an $8 million loan. This strong financial position enables KULR to invest in future growth and innovation.

Expansion and Innovation

KULR’s launch of KULR One Air, which quickly expanded to over 150 commercial-ready SKUs, positions the company in the rapidly growing UAV, drone, and electric aviation markets. This strategic move showcases KULR’s commitment to innovation and market expansion.

AI and Telecom Market Entry

The company is entering the AI data center and telecom infrastructure markets with new battery backup units (BBUs) and battery energy storage systems (BESS). This entry is expected to drive significant growth, leveraging KULR’s expertise in energy management solutions.

Texas Headquarters Expansion

Plans are underway to expand the Texas headquarters to over 100,000 square feet by 2026. This expansion aims to increase production capacity to over 50,000 packs per month, supporting KULR’s ambitious growth targets.

Decline in Services Revenue

While product revenue grew by 112%, services revenue saw a significant decline of 74%. This shift indicates a strategic focus on product-driven growth, which may impact service-related revenue streams but aligns with the company’s long-term goals.

One-time Impairments

Due to information from German Bionic, KULR had to take one-time impairments. However, these are not expected to materially affect US commercial sales, suggesting limited long-term impact on the company’s financial health.

Forward-looking Guidance

KULR anticipates a tenfold growth in its energy storage and management business over the next three years, driven by high demand for its KULR One platform, including the recently launched KULR One Air. The Texas-based facility’s expansion is set to significantly boost production capacity, supporting this ambitious growth trajectory. Despite the decline in services revenue, the company’s focus on research, development, and expansion positions it for sustained growth, with a trailing twelve-month revenue record of $16.7 million.

In conclusion, KULR Technology Group’s earnings call reflects a positive outlook, with record revenue growth and a strong financial position paving the way for future expansion and innovation. The company’s strategic focus on product-driven growth and market expansion positions it well for continued success in high-growth markets.

data.title: West Wits Mining Advances Qala Shallows Project with New Funding and Operational Milestones
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

An update from West Wits Mining Limited ( (AU:WWI) ) is now available.

West Wits Mining Limited has made significant progress at its Qala Shallows Gold Project, securing US$12.5 million in funding from Nebari Natural Resources Credit Fund II LP. This funding is part of a larger US$35 million facility and will support the company’s efforts to advance underground development and infrastructure. The company has successfully delivered its first underground ore to the surface and is on track for its first gold pour in March 2026. With the commissioning of new equipment and an expanding workforce, West Wits is poised to achieve a steady-state production of 70,000 ounces annually, marking a crucial step in its strategic plan to establish a high-margin gold operation in the Witwatersrand Basin.

More about West Wits Mining Limited

West Wits Mining Limited is a mining company focused on gold production, primarily operating within South Africa’s Witwatersrand Basin. The company is engaged in the development of the Qala Shallows Gold Project, with a strategic emphasis on advancing underground operations and infrastructure to achieve sustainable, high-margin gold production.

Average Trading Volume: 22,445,086

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$191.7M

data.title: Emmerson Resources Updates White Devil Gold Deposit Estimate
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

The latest update is out from Emmerson Resources Limited ( (AU:ERM) ).

Emmerson Resources Limited has announced an update to the Mineral Resource Estimate (MRE) for the White Devil gold deposit, which is part of the Tennant Creek Mineral Field. The updated MRE now totals 4.71 million tonnes at 4.1 grams per tonne of gold, amounting to 616,200 ounces of contained gold. This includes a significant increase in the Indicated Resource category, which now stands at 549,100 ounces. The company has commenced feasibility studies to determine the best development strategy, with the potential for a significant portion of the open pit resource to convert to Probable Ore Reserves. Emmerson has also exercised its rights to retain a 40% contributing interest in the White Devil Project, which is expected to enhance the project’s economic viability and future development.

More about Emmerson Resources Limited

Emmerson Resources Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is engaged in joint ventures to expand its resource base and increase confidence in its mineral resources, particularly in the Tennant Creek Mineral Field in Northern Territory, Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 698,391

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$188.5M

data.title: Saturn Metals Expands Drilling Operations at Apollo Hill Following Positive Results
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Saturn Metals Ltd. ( (AU:STN) ) has provided an announcement.

Saturn Metals Limited has mobilized additional Reverse Circulation drill rigs to its Apollo Hill Gold Project in Western Australia to accelerate resource growth and step-out drilling. This decision follows positive assay results from recent drilling, which have reinforced the potential of the higher-grade Iris Trend and demonstrated the possibility of extending the 2.24Moz Apollo Hill Mineral Resource. The new drilling program aims to convert more Inferred Resources to the Indicated category, supporting the company’s development plans and the upcoming Definitive Feasibility Study. The results are expected to positively impact Saturn’s operations and provide further insights into the project’s potential.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:STN) stock is a Buy with a A$1.93 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Saturn Metals Ltd. stock, see the AU:STN Stock Forecast page.

More about Saturn Metals Ltd.

Saturn Metals Limited is a mining company focused on gold exploration and development. The company operates primarily in Western Australia and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the ticker STN. Its main project is the Apollo Hill Gold Deposit, which it wholly owns and is located near Leonora, WA.

Average Trading Volume: 1,567,713

data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

New Hope Corporation Limited ( (AU:NHC) ) has shared an announcement.

At its 2025 Annual General Meeting, New Hope Corporation Limited announced a substantial increase in coal production, achieving 10.7 million tonnes, an 18% rise from the previous year. This growth, alongside disciplined cost control, resulted in strong earnings and shareholder returns, including A$347 million in fully franked dividends. The company also emphasized its commitment to local communities, contributing over A$450 million in wages, supplier payments, and other benefits. Additionally, New Hope initiated an on-market share buy-back and introduced a Dividend Reinvestment Plan to enhance shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NHC) stock is a Hold with a A$4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on New Hope Corporation Limited stock, see the AU:NHC Stock Forecast page.

More about New Hope Corporation Limited

New Hope Corporation Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focused on coal production. The company is known for its low-cost assets and has a significant market presence, with operations including the New Acland Mine. It is committed to providing economic benefits to local communities and maintaining a strong operational and financial performance.
